notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jorbit Vivas.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Curtis Mead called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Joey Wiemer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Wiemer homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds out softly, pitcher Martín Pérez to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jorbit Vivas.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas reaches on a fielder's choice. CJ Abrams to 3rd. Jacob Young to 2nd. Fielding error by second baseman Ozzie Albies.

notableEvents.label: Matt Olson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Olson grounds into a double play, second baseman Jorbit Vivas to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Curtis Mead. Drake Baldwin out at 2nd. Matt Olson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mauricio Dubón GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón grounds into a double play, second baseman Jorbit Vivas to first baseman Curtis Mead. Ozzie Albies out at 2nd. Mauricio Dubón out at 1st.
